prerequisites: A Beamer account with access to the dashboard.
An API key generated in the Beamer dashboard under Settings > API, with the permissions needed to read the data you want to sync.
A start date (start_date), an RFC 3339 date-time in the format YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ, used to bound the incremental sync.

authMethods.name: API key (Bearer token)
authMethods.summary: The connector authenticates with the single secret field api_key. It is sent to the Beamer REST API (base URL https://api.getbeamer.com/v0/) as an HTTP Bearer token via the Authorization header. Generate and manage the key in the Beamer dashboard under Settings > API, and ensure it has the permissions required for the actions you call, since insufficient permissions return a 403 error.

setupSteps.title: Create a Beamer API key
setupSteps.body: Sign in to your Beamer dashboard and go to Settings > API. Create an API key and grant it the permissions needed to read the data you want to sync. Copy the key value; it is used as the api_key credential.

setupSteps.title: Provide the API key
setupSteps.body: Enter the copied key in the connector's api_key field. The connector sends it as a Bearer token in the Authorization header on every request to https://api.getbeamer.com/v0/.

setupSteps.title: Set the start date
setupSteps.body: Set start_date to the earliest point you want to sync from. It must be an RFC 3339 UTC date-time matching the pattern YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ (for example 2021-01-01T00:00:00Z). The connector uses this to derive the dateFrom and dateTo query parameters for incremental syncs.
